validation.label: inflation-relief repricing

supporting_results.title: https://www.livemint.com/market/oil-prices-fall-on-mounting-hopes-for-de-escalation-in-us-iran-war-11780687079949.html
supporting_results.reason: The evidence supports a narrower oil-led disinflation narrative rather than a broad inflation-relief repricing claim. E2 and E3 say oil prices fell on de-escalation/diplomatic hopes, which is consistent with easing inflation pressure. E4 shows the rupee strengthening on the day, which can fit a risk-on repricing. But E1 points the other way by highlighting elevated crude and higher projected CPI inflation, so the full claim is not directly and cleanly supported.
